title: Constraint Surface (Phase 0 contract lock)
description: A typed, hashed, source-attributed constraint object consumed by prompt assembly. Constraint surfaces are the only authority NeuronForge accepts for what the model must obey.

constraint_surface_id.description: Stable, opaque identifier for this constraint surface instance.

authoritative.description: True if and only if this constraint surface was issued by an authoritative producer for its constraint_type. Derived or runtime-trusted constraints must be false.

items.description: Opaque constraint items. Phase 0 does not normalize their internal shape; downstream consumers interpret them by constraint_type.

source_refs.description: Stable references back to the producing systems or files that originated the items in this surface.

hash.description: Hex-encoded hash of the canonical-JSON serialization of items + source_refs + constraint_type, computed under hash_algorithm.

allOf.description: Authority/trust coherence: untrusted constraint surfaces may not be authoritative.
Authority/trust coherence: derived constraint surfaces are by definition not authoritative.
